= Journal 2026-03-29 =

== FZF with PowerShell ==
:fzf:ripgrep:bat:fd:powershell:

- [[/diary/2026-02-15#FZF with PowerShell]] demonstrates Vim integration
  for `cmd` and PowerShell.
- [[https://dev.to/kevinnitro/fzf-advanced-integration-in-powershell-53p0|Fzf advanced integration in PowerShell]]

{{{powershell
fd --type file --follow --hidden --exclude .git --exclude '*tmp*' |
    fzf --prompt 'Files> ' `
      --header-first `
      --header 'CTRL-S: Switch between Files/Directories' `
      --bind 'ctrl-s:transform:if not "%FZF_PROMPT%"=="Files> " (echo ^change-prompt^(Files^> ^)^+^reload^(fd --type file^)) else (echo ^change-prompt^(Directory^> ^)^+^reload^(fd --type directory^))' `
      --preview 'if "%FZF_PROMPT%"=="Files> " (bat --color=always {}) else (eza -T --colour=always --icons=always {})'
}}}

- [[https://www.powershellgallery.com/packages/PSFzf|PSGallery / PSFzf]] is a PowerShell wrapper for `fzf`.

== Chezmoi Dotfiles Management ==
:chezmoi:rcm:

Manage your dotfiles across multiple diverse machines, securely.

chezmoi's documentation [[https://chezmoi.io/]]
- Migrate existing dotsfiles:
  - [[https://github.com/twpayne/chezmoi/discussions/2330|chezmoi discussions #2330]]

{{{bash
pixi global install chezmoi

git clone https://github.com/jfishe/dotfiles.git $HOME/.local/share/chezmoi
chezmoi cd
mkdir home
echo home > .chezmoiroot
chezmoi add --follow ~/.bashrc
rm .bashrc
}}}
